title: Space-Plug Spectre 5mm x 120mm CSK Multipurpose Countersunk Screw (25 Pack) For Joinery, Repairs, Wood And Fittings
features: Screws Selected For Quality - Space-Plug fitting products have been developed by joiners and fitters so are suitable for a variety of professional and DIY uses.
25 Pack Of 120mm Screws - Multipack of screws suitable for drilling, fixing and effecting repairs.
Toolkit Essential - These screws are a popular size and are an essential part of any trade or home toolkit.
Countersunk Screws - Perfect for precision alongside pre-drilled holes which feature a countersink.
Screws To Fit Flush To Surfaces - Resting flush with the object they are fitted to, these screws are also known as flat-heat screws.
description: Product Description Screws Selected For Quality - Space-Plug fitting products have been developed by joiners and fitters so are suitable for a variety of professional and DIY uses. 25 Pack Of 5 x 120mm Screws - Multipack of screws suitable for drilling, fixing and effecting repairs. Toolkit Essential - These screws are a popular size and are an essential part of any trade or home toolkit. Countersunk Screws - Perfect for precision alongside pre-drilled holes which feature a countersink. Screws To Fit Flush To Surfaces - Resting flush with the object they are fitted to, these screws are also known as flat-head screws. Space-Plug Multipurpose Screws for any job Space-Plug is a professional yet incredibly simple solution for fitting kitchen base units, It’s the only “Designed for Purpose” fixing on the market specifically for installers. Space-Plug is faster, neater and wholly more efficiently than any traditional methods. Only one fixing per unit is usual and completely removes the need to install skewed L-brackets or work through fiddly ports. Its adjustability means there’s no need to fuss with shims or plastic packers. Can be fitted as required anywhere on a target surface allowing it to line up with wall studs or avoiding pipes, cables etc. Space-Plug Multipurpose Screw These screws are suitable for a variety of materials including wood, plastic and cement boards and rest flush with the surface they are inserted into. As Space-Plug is fitted with the unit in place it is 100% accurate and removes the need to ever move a unit before fixing. Space-Plug is also accessible after installation. Space-Plug allows simple removal of units post fitting. 25 Pack of 120mm x 5mm multipurpose CSK screws – an ideal countersunk screw to use in conjunction with the Space-Plug XL, kitchen units with 65mm service voids, 18mm solid backs/cross braces and solid walls. These screws are suitable for a variety of materials including wood, plastic and cement boards and rest flush with the surface they are inserted into. Not just limited to its intended purpose For WC and bathroom installations Use Space-Plug and Space-Plug Screws together and other ad-hoc uses soon become very apparent, behind WC cisterns, levelling legs, boxing in spacers etc. Ideally for kitchen units Space-Plug is a professional yet incredibly simple solution for fitting kitchen base units, book cases, drawer units, display units and many other types of fitted furniture Even fixing downspouts to the wall Put a bag of Space-Plug fixings and Screws in your tool kit now and find out how fast, simple, strong and useful they are.
